basics.name: Nguyen Ngoc Quy
basics.label: Game & Platform Engineer
basics.summary: Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in high-performance C++ systems. Specialist in CI/CD automation, Unreal Engine 5 migrations, and internal infrastructure development. Proven track record of operating independently in global remote environments across multiple time zones.

work.name: Gameloft
highlights: Core Engineering: Developed high-performance C++ systems for AAA mobile titles, managed Java-based Android platform integrations, and utilized Python for extensive toolset and pipeline scripting.
Jenkins CI/CD: Architected and maintained the build infrastructure for Sniper Fury, streamlining release stability and deployment pipelines.
Unreal Engine 5: Participated in the critical UI/UX migration for March of Empires, refactoring legacy systems to leverage modern rendering and widget frameworks.

Technical Leadership & Mentorship: Orchestrated specialized workshops and programming contests integrated with internal architecture while mentoring junior engineers to improve onboarding and documentation standards.
Cross-stack Adaptability: Successfully transitioned across 4+ major project teams (Asphalt, Sniper Fury, March of Empires, DML), mastering diverse legacy and modern tech stacks.
Global Remote Collaboration: Operate independently within a distributed workforce, collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams across international time zones.
English Communication: Utilize fluent business communication to manage stakeholder requirements and technical documentation in a multi-national environment.

education.institution: Hanoi University of Science and Technology

projects.name: Backyard
projects.description: Architected a local-first LLM inference lab utilizing a high-performance Rust backend for managing and benchmarking servers on consumer hardware.
